> If you're an agent or human landing in this repo for the

> seeing what exists is itself the creative catalyst.

## How to navigate deeper

- **The Component Registry** (`.jos/registry.yaml`) is the single
  source of truth for what exists. This cheatsheet is derived
  from it.
- **Per-substrate indexes** (`<substrate>/_index.yaml`) hold the
  full listing for each type.
- **Per-domain INDEX MD files** (`.jos/<substrate>/INDEX-<DOMAIN>.md`)
  filter by domain (engineering / data / meta / etc.).
- **Cross-lens projections** — `.jos/awareness/`, `.jos/portfolio/`,
  `.jos/back-refs.json` — each surfaces a different facet of
  the same components.

## When does this regenerate

Every charter-sync. If you've just committed substrate changes
and don't see them here yet, the next charter-sync will catch
up. Run `scripts/jos render` to force a regeneration.
